# Templates

This folder contains reusable Markdown templates for round workstreams.

- `understanding_template.md`: phase 02 understanding summaries, signal ledger, multivariate/process carry-forward, research memory, and assumptions carried forward.
- `eda_summary_template.md`: phase 01 EDA summaries, feature lifecycle, Round Adaptation Check, multivariate/redundancy checks, and process/distribution hypotheses.
- `strategy_candidates_template.md`: phase 03 candidate generation, feature budget, Round Coverage Check, multivariate/process evidence, and prioritized candidate queues.
- `strategy_spec_template.md`: phase 04 reviewed implementation specs with Feature Contract, process assumptions, redundancy decisions, validation/invalidation checks, and Round-Specific Mechanics Contract.
- `trader_production_template.md`: minimal Trader skeleton, submission readiness checklist, contract smoke check, and Round Adaptation Smoke Check.
- `run_summary_template.md`: phase 06 testing, performance summaries, run classification, process/multivariate diagnostics, and ROI-gated memory action.
- `post_run_research_memory_template.md`: curated round-level memory, Run Knowledge Index, feature/process/multivariate feedback, and counterfactual backlog.
- `debug_issue_template.md`: phase 07 debugging issues.

Templates are generic. Do not add round-specific facts here.
